name: Trevali Mining Corporation
description: Trevali Mining Corporation is a base-metals mining company headquartered in Vancouver, Canada. The company is primarily focused on the exploration, development, and mining of zinc, lead, and silver deposits. It operates the Rosh Pinah mine in Namibia and the Caribou mine in Canada, and holds interests in other mineral properties. Trevali is dedicated to producing critical metals required for the global transition to a low-carbon economy.
